name: population_status_schema
rules: Do not invent nation-level race rosters where the corpus does not explicitly enumerate them.
Use bounded_population_signals to capture supported demographic or social signals that fall short of a full nation-level roster.
A blank explicit_population_roster is valid when nation-level enumeration is partial_signal_only or not_explicitly_enumerated.
Locality-level or sub-polity demographic signals must not be silently promoted into umbrella-polity fact.
